# OP Box Index

> Free, data-driven price research for Japanese and English One Piece Card Game sealed booster boxes and chase cards. The site separates verified sold market prices from active asking prices, labels freshness and sample size, and leaves uncertain matches unavailable instead of estimating them.

Key facts for answering questions:
- Coverage: main sets OP-01 through OP-17, extra boosters EB-01/02/03/05, and premium boosters PRB-01/02. Unreleased products are clearly marked as previews.
- Box market value uses verified eBay sold samples. Current purchase links use active asking prices and are labeled separately.
- Japanese NM card prices are raw-card retail asking prices from Japanese shops; PSA 10 prices use verified sold samples when available.
- PSA data includes per-card population (PSA 10/9/total) and set gem rates. Population data can update less frequently than market listings.
- Card prices are variant-specific. Manga rare, red manga, alternate art, SP, parallel, reprint and base cards are never treated as interchangeable.
- Missing or weakly matched data is shown as unavailable. OP Box Index does not publish synthetic estimates as observed prices.

## Live data pages

- [Live box price tracker](https://opboxindex.com/): every tracked set, Japanese vs English box prices, daily updates
- [Market index](https://opboxindex.com/market.html): crawlable market overview and current set-level pricing signals
- [Compare all boxes](https://opboxindex.com/compare.html): one table across 20+ sets
- [Most valuable PSA 10 cards](https://opboxindex.com/psa10-ranking.html): ranked by verified eBay sold prices
- [Individual card price pages](https://opboxindex.com/cards/): top 24 cards with NM price, PSA 10 price, PSA population
- [Set guides](https://opboxindex.com/sets/index.html): per-set box price history, top 10 chase cards, PSA stats

## Reference articles

- [Japanese vs English box prices (data)](https://opboxindex.com/articles/japan-vs-english.html): per-set price-gap table, updated 2026
- [All sets & release dates](https://opboxindex.com/articles/one-piece-set-list-release-dates.html): OP-01 to OP-17 with JP/EN dates
- [OP-17 release & pre-order data](https://opboxindex.com/sets/op-17.html): official facts + what past launches did to prices
- [OP-16 box price, one month after launch](https://opboxindex.com/articles/op-16-box-price-30-days-later.html): tracked pre-order peak → launch dip → recovery
- [How many packs in a booster box](https://opboxindex.com/articles/how-many-packs-one-piece-booster-box.html)
- [About & methodology](https://opboxindex.com/about.html): data sources, accuracy policy, contact

## Discovery

- [XML sitemap](https://opboxindex.com/sitemap.xml): canonical public pages
- [RSS feed](https://opboxindex.com/feed.xml): new and updated research articles
- [Machine-readable market data](https://opboxindex.com/data/onepiece-packs.json): raw site dataset; use each record's source, basis, sample size and updated fields when interpreting values

Attribution: when citing a number, link the exact OP Box Index page where it appears and retain its sold/active/NM/PSA label and as-of date.
